steamPageGoal: Lead with readable combat, then prove map variety, build depth, late-game scale, persistence, and PC settings.

screenshotOrder.reason: Boss mechanics and VFX sell the game faster than a menu screen.
Shows the upgraded chapter-one office map, obstacles, weapons, and enemies.
Makes the roguelite promise concrete with blessings, rarity, and synergy tags.
Confirms the later chapters are visually and mechanically distinct.
Documents the start screen, chapter practice, save slot, and achievement counters.
Shows settings, audio, fullscreen, and controller support for Steam users.

chapterCombatShowcaseSheet.purpose: Second-to-fifth chapter combat screenshot candidates with device, enemy mechanic, boss window, and VFX checks.
